debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
inst✝¹ : Group α
inst✝ : Group β
F : @CategoryInContext.Functor Unit Unit (Category.Monoid α) (Category.Monoid β)
⊢ ∃ f, ∀ (x : α), @CategoryInContext.Functor.homF Unit Unit (Category.Monoid α) (Category.Monoid β) F () () x = f x

proof:
refine ⟨
    { toFun := fun x => F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x
      map_one' := by
        simpa using (F.map_id ())
      map_mul' := by
        intro x y
        simpa using (F.map_comp (X := ()) (Y := ()) (Z := ()) x y) },
    ?_⟩
  intro x
  rfl

classical
  let f : α → β := fun x => F.homF (X := ()) (Y := ()) x
  have f_one : f 1 = 1 := by
    simpa [f, Category.id] using (F.map_id ())
  have f_mul : ∀ x y : α, f (x * y) = f x * f y := by
    intro x y
    simpa [f, Category.comp] using (F.map_comp (X := ()) (Y := ()) (Z := ()) x y)
  refine ⟨
    { toFun := f
      map_one' := f_one
      map_mul' := f_mul }, ?_⟩
  intro x
  rfl
